calibration_cohort: PetDB primary4 common-21 out-of-fold predictions under each validation strategy

figure_contracts.validation_performance: grouped bars from zero; exact labels; two model colors
figure_contracts.grouped_confusion: two row-normalized heatmaps on identical 0–1 scale
figure_contracts.calibration: four class reliability curves plus dark-neutral ideal line
figure_contracts.cross_database_transfer: grouped bars from zero; direction × ontology variant

caveat: Calibration is descriptive out-of-fold reliability without post-hoc recalibration. Cross-database transfer excludes MORB and mixes database with ontology shift.
